name: loopshouse
description: Loops House CLI — manage hackathon projects, ideate with AI, and submit from your terminal or AI agent

scripts.build: bun build bin/loops.ts --outdir dist --target node && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='dist/loops.js';const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');fs.writeFileSync(f,c.replace(/^#!.*\n/,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'))"
